title: eragrostis nutans
intro: Eragrostis nutans, also known as weeping love grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and providing relief from respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis nutans typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and roots of the plant.
